query:
SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.displayName, p.whatsappName, p.avatarInitials, p.livesRemaining, p.currentStreak, p.daysComplete, p.totalPoints, p.createdAt, p.updatedAt, u.email, u.name AS userName
FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.whatsappName, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.name, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
ORDER BY p.updatedAt DESC;
command:

FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.whatsappName, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.name, '')) LIKE '%nay%'
ORDER BY p.updatedAt DESC;
